# CMFormatDescription.Extensions.Value.CameraCalibrationDataLensCollection.LensDomain

**Enumeration**

Specifies the kind of lens

## Declaration

```swift
enum LensDomain
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **CMFormatDescription.Extensions.Value.CameraCalibrationDataLensCollection.LensDomain.color**: Camera lense which captures color data.
